plan.goal: storage-boundary-redesign: separate true shared runtime state from worktree-local semantic cache state, introduce explicit shared-vs-local store ownership and paths, migrate existing repos safely, and validate that cross-worktree shared semantics remain correct while local semantic cache state no longer bloats the shared runtime db.
